categories.name: 丧类
categories.description: 消极、沮丧、看透世事的台词

categories.name: 躺平类
categories.description: 放弃挣扎、随遇而安的台词

categories.name: 毒舌类
categories.description: 犀利吐槽、一针见血的台词

categories.name: 扎心类
categories.description: 戳中痛点、让人破防的台词

categories.name: 哲理类
categories.description: 有深度、值得思考的台词

categories.name: 职场类
categories.description: 关于工作、人际、社会的台词

categories.name: 人生类
categories.description: 关于人生感悟、成长体验的台词

categories.name: 其他
categories.description: 不属于以上分类但适合做答案的台词
